semantic.role: Schema definition file providing the canonical output contract for all ArchSpine summary units (source files, documents, configs, folders, projects).
responsibilities: Define the exact JSON structure for source file summaries, including semantic metadata, graph dependencies, and localized descriptions.
Define the JSON structure for document summaries, focusing on narrative purpose and role.
Define the JSON structure for configuration file summaries, designed for configuration intent and usage.
Define the JSON structure for folder/directory summaries, describing collective purpose and component responsibility.
Define the JSON structure for project-level summaries, capturing high-level vision and module orchestration.
outOfScope: Does not implement any validation logic to enforce the schema.
Does not generate or process actual summary data; it is purely a specification.
Does not define runtime behavior, serialization, or parsing utilities.
Does not include schemas for other potential unit types such as test files, assets, or binaries.
invariants: Every summary unit must conform to the structure defined by the corresponding schema in this file.
Each schema is a string constant that must be parseable as a valid JSON object.
The localized block within each schema must contain at least one language key with natural prose descriptions.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a formal, standardized output contract for all ArchSpine summary units, ensuring consistency and interoperability across the system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era, marking the initial release with these schema definitions.

publicSurface.description: Defines the JSON schema for summarizing a source code file, including semantic role, responsibilities, public surface entry list, drift detection, dependency graph, and localized descriptions. Required by any component that produces or validates source file summaries.
Defines the JSON schema for summarizing a document (e.g., Markdown file), focusing on narrative role, purpose, and content description. Used by document summary generators.
Defines the JSON schema for summarizing a configuration file, capturing its functional role and usage context. Used by config summary generators.
Defines the JSON schema for summarizing a directory, including collective role and component responsibilities. Used by folder summary generators.
Defines the JSON schema for a project-level summary, including a high-level vision statement and comprehensive module orchestration description. Used by project summary generators.
